title: India orders temporary ban on Telegram over exam fraud concerns
snippet: The restrictions include a nationwide ban on Telegram until June 22 and a requirement to disable the app's message editing feature.

title: This startup’s super metals could soon be in military drones, luxury watches, and chef’s knives
snippet: Instead of heating metals, Foundation Alloy beats them into submission. The startup has raised $22 million to scale up production of its alloys.
